_README: Curated roster — ground truth for resolving vote-roll names to subjects (connections-graph Phase 1). Source of truth: this file. Apply with scripts/seed_roster.py (idempotent upsert). Rosters CHANGE (April elections); edit here and re-run the seeder. Each member: canonical_name (display), aliases (raw forms seen in roll calls — the seeder normalizes them; council is last-name-only so the surname is the load-bearing alias), term window with basis (cited = a verbatim minutes date; observed = derived from roll-call appearance only; null = unknown/open), and source (citation trail, stored in subjects.metadata). All entries are public officials -> publishable.
